changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition (id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag) select gen_random_uuid(), fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, cd.case_definition_key, cd.case_definition_version_tag from form_io_form_definition fd join case_definition cd on fd.name = concat(cd.case_definition_key, '.summary') where fd.case_definition_key is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition ( id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag ) select gen_random_uuid() as id, * from (select distinct fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, pdcd.case_definition_key, pdcd.case_definition_version_tag from form_io_form_definition fd join process_link pl on pl.form_definition_id = fd.id join act_re_procdef pd on pd.id_ = pl.process_definition_id join process_definition_case_definition pdcd on pdcd.process_definition_id = pd.id_ where pl.migration_form_name is not null and fd.case_definition_key is null and fd.case_definition_version_tag is null )

update process_link set form_definition_id = fd.id from process_link pl join act_re_procdef pd on pd.id_ = pl.process_definition_id join process_definition_case_definition pdcd on pdcd.process_definition_id = pd.id_ join form_io_form_definition fd on pl.migration_form_name = fd.name and pdcd.case_definition_key = fd.case_definition_key and pdcd.case_definition_version_tag = fd.case_definition_version_tag where process_link.id = pl.id
